summary: A short clip from a television show, identified by a SON OF A CRITCH logo in the upper left corner, showing a heavyset bald man with a reddish beard wearing a denim jacket over a white shirt, looking ahead with a puzzled expression. Burned-in captions in white and yellow appear across the lower portion reading What difference and then does it make?

script.scene: A bald bearded man in a denim jacket reacts, captioned What difference.
The same man continues, captioned does it make?

notable_text: SON OF A CRITCH; What difference does it make?
